title: RealisticCraft
description: adds true realism which has been lacking from vanilla
body:
**!USE JEI FOR RECIPES!**
This mod adds a ton of stuff from biomes to blocks entities and etc


Complete overhaul of minecraft inspired by itsjim


Adds things from **Bis(2,4,5-trichloro-6-(pentyloxycarbonyl)phenyl)oxalate** to **Cow Ravager**


Im gonna make this description extremely short as i forgot to save my description >:(
